series_metadata.series_description: Records include selected resumes and screening documentation, interview packets which include interview questions with interviewee responses and interviewer scoring, selection justifications, contractor confidentiality agreements, contractor IT policy acknowledgements, satisfaction or dissatisfaction with the consultant’s performance, and reason for dissatisfaction (when appropriate).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 8 years then destroy. Paper records can be securely shredded after scanning. ; Electronic: 8 years is needed for continuity of services., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
